title: ProductionCertificationReport
description: Standardized production readiness certification report generated by Parikshak for BHIV products.

trace_id.description: Unique execution link trace identifier from upstream.

certified_at.description: UTC timestamp when the certification was computed.

verifier.description: Identifier/version of the certification service engine.

risk_summary.description: Human-readable summary of risk findings and verdict rationale.

critical_failures.description: List of failed mandatory checks causing rejection.

warnings.description: List of warnings, minor non-blocking issues or missing optional parameters.

evidence_summary.description: Audit presence matrix of expected ecosystem artifact files.

replay_status.description: Status of automated execution replay safety check.

governance_status.description: Status of cryptographic governance approvals and authority gates.

observability_status.description: Status of OpenTelemetry traces and observability instrumentation checks.

security_status.description: Status of package vulnerability scans and signature validations.

recovery_status.description: Status of rollback capabilities and disaster recovery tests.
